name: Hexblade's Curse
description: Starting at 1st level, you gain the ability to place a baleful curse on someone. As a bonus action, choose one creature you can see within 30 feet of you. The target is cursed for 1 minute. The curse ends early if the target dies, you die, or you are incapacitated. While cursed, you gain a bonus to damage rolls against the cursed target equal to your proficiency bonus, any attack roll you make against the cursed target is a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20, and if the cursed target dies you regain hit points equal to your warlock level plus your Charisma modifier (minimum 1). You can't use this feature again until you finish a short or long rest.
